query: sodium vapor street light orange yellow night photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / sickly_cast — sodium vapor street light cast, orange/yellow night tint

response.objective_caption: A large leafy tree stands in the center of a residential street at night, its canopy decorated with small white lights. Parked cars line the curb in front of multi-story buildings with peaked roofs and illuminated windows. A stop sign is visible on the right side of the frame beneath a dark sky.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A large leafy tree stands in the center of a residential street at night, its canopy decorated with small white lights, all bathed in a sickly yellow-orange sodium vapor cast. Parked cars line the curb in front of multi-story buildings with peaked roofs and illuminated windows. A stop sign is visible on the right side of the frame beneath a dark sky, while the unnatural tint shifts surfaces toward unsettling hues.
